strengths: Demonstrated clear understanding of extracorporeal knot tying technique
Showed proper loop formation with appropriate sizing
Maintained good instrument positioning throughout demonstration
weaknesses: This was an educational video rather than an actual task performance
No measurable timing or completion data available for assessment
Cannot evaluate actual suturing execution or knot security

drills.name: Timed suture completion drill
drills.description: Complete full task5 sequences with actual Penrose drain suturing under time pressure to build performance data.
drills.targets_weakness: Lack of actual task performance data.

drills.name: Needle driving angle practice
drills.description: Practice 10 passes loading the needle at a stable driving angle before entering the drain to improve technique consistency.
drills.targets_weakness: Need to transition from theory to practical execution.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid theoretical understanding into consistent timed performances with the actual FLS task5 setup.
